channel.title: Boundaries 101 for Men
channel.description: Practical, no-nonsense coaching for men who want to build and protect their self-respect. Learn the skills most men were never taught — so you can stop feeling drained and start living on your own terms.
channel.itunes:author: Boundaries 101 for Men
channel.itunes:summary: Practical, no-nonsense coaching for men who want to build and protect their self-respect. Learn the skills most men were never taught — so you can stop feeling drained and start living on your own terms.

item.title: How to Deal With Passive-Aggressive People Without Losing Respect
item.description:
Passive-aggressive behavior can make you question your own gut. Learn how to deal with passive-aggressive people, set boundaries, and keep your self-respect. Calm words beat covert hostility.
► The 4-step Mirror Response for passive-aggressive behavior ► Exact boundary scripts for partners, coworkers, family, and late friends ► How to stop people-pleasing and hold your ground without becoming hostile
⏱️ TIMESTAMPS 0:00 - "I'm not mad" and the trap 1:05 - Why passive-aggression messes with your head 2:20 - The 7 classic passive-aggressive moves 3:35 - The hidden cost of staying quiet 4:30 - The Mirror Response 5:05 - Step 1: Mirror the behavior 6:15 - Step 2: Invite directness 7:15 - Step 3: State the impact and standard 8:25 - Step 4: Set a real consequence 9:35 - Scripts for partners, coworkers, and family 11:10 - "What if they get angry?" 11:55 - Your challenge: one sentence, one boundary
Boundaries 101 for Men helps you build clear, healthy boundaries without guilt or drama. Real talk and practical scripts for work, relationships, family, and self-respect. If you're done being walked on, you're in the right place.
#boundaries #communication #selfrespect #mensmentalhealth #selfimprovement
🎥 Watch on YouTube: https://youtu.be/c7egP6CObuA
item.itunes:title: How to Deal With Passive-Aggressive People Without Losing Respect
item.itunes:summary:
Passive-aggressive behavior can make you question your own gut. Learn how to deal with passive-aggressive people, set boundaries, and keep your self-respect. Calm words beat covert hostility.
► The 4-step Mirror Response for passive-aggressive behav...
item.itunes:keywords: boundaries for men,how to set boundaries,how to deal with passive aggressive people,passive aggressive behavior,dealing with passive aggressive behavior,passive aggressive communication,boundaries with passive aggressive people,how to respond to passive aggression,passive aggressive relationship,passive aggressive partner,passive aggressive coworker,silent treatment

item.title: How to STOP Guilt Tripping Without Feeling Selfish
item.description:
Guilt tripping makes you feel selfish for having boundaries. Learn how men can say no, spot emotional manipulation, and protect self-respect.
► How to spot the 5 moves of guilt-tripping before you cave ► The 4-step Guilt Filter Response for family, partners, and friends ► Exact scripts to hold your boundary without over-explaining or fake apologies
⏱️ TIMESTAMPS 0:00 - When guilt becomes control 1:36 - Why guilt trips hit men so hard 4:08 - The cost of saying yes resentfully 6:18 - Step 1: Name the play 8:22 - Step 2: Run the Guilt Filter 10:42 - Step 3: Answer clearly 12:58 - Step 4: Hold the line 14:46 - Real scripts: mom, partner, friend 16:34 - What if they get angry?
Boundaries 101 for Men helps you build clear, respectful boundaries at work, in relationships, and with family. If you're tired of guilt, people-pleasing, and conflict avoidance, this channel is for you. Real scripts, practical frameworks, and no-fluff coaching for stronger self-respect.
#boundaries #boundariesformen #selfrespect #mensmentalhealth #communication
🎥 Watch on YouTube: https://youtu.be/viqaeZZk6O4

► How to spot the 5 moves of guilt-tripping before you cave ► The 4-step Guilt Filter Response for family,...
item.itunes:keywords: boundaries for men,how to set boundaries,guilt tripping,how to stop guilt tripping,guilt trip manipulation,emotional manipulation,emotional blackmail,how to say no without guilt,setting boundaries with family,setting boundaries in relationships,setting boundaries with parents,setting boundaries with mother

item.title: How to STOP People-Pleasing: The #1 Rule Every Man Needs
item.description:
Stop sacrificing your needs just to keep others happy. Discover the truth about people-pleasing, boundaries, and self-respect for men—starting today.
► The real reason men struggle to say no—and how to break free ► The Pause, Check, Choose method for setting boundaries (with exact scripts) ► How to handle guilt, pushback, and fear without losing respect
⏱️ TIMESTAMPS 0:00 - The Cost of People-Pleasing 1:11 - Why Men Struggle to Say No 3:11 - The Emotional & Practical Price You Pay 4:51 - The Pause, Check, Choose Framework 8:35 - Real-Life Scenarios & Scripts 11:33 - Handling Pushback and Objections 13:31 - Your Next Step: Building Self-Respect
Boundaries 101 for Men is your go-to channel for practical, no-nonsense advice on building and protecting your self-respect. Learn the skills most men were never taught—so you can stop feeling drained and start living on your own terms.
#boundaries #mentalhealth #selfimprovement #masculinity #peoplepleasing
🎥 Watch on YouTube: https://youtu.be/3S446PBHJh4
